campaign_brief.name: Verified Membership Pilot Explainer
campaign_brief.audience: Acquaintances and selected Korean individual investors who can manage their own broker, LLM, SNS, approval, and risk boundaries.
exclusions: paid signal or model portfolio buyers
campaign_brief.promise: A user-controlled investing workflow that puts safety guards, portfolio visibility, agent summaries, and explicit approvals in one auditable place.
proof: Autofolio already has mock/paper-first safety defaults and human approval boundaries.
The current product has membership gating, portfolio views, manuals, acknowledgements, and readiness checks.
Business Plan v1 records selected-user membership, verified signup request, and user-owned account/token boundaries.
campaign_brief.rollback: Archive the draft source packet and withdraw any exported preview before public use if claim review changes.

needs_review.reason: Recommendation wording must not imply investment advice, paid signals, model portfolios, or discretionary management.
Exact pricing, payment, refund, support, privacy, and receipt policy are not public-ready.
Provider policy, privacy, OAuth/token handling, and secret storage need review before public copy.

copy_inventory.text: Autofolio helps selected users run a safer, more auditable investing workflow with portfolio visibility, agent summaries, and explicit approvals.
Start with a verified membership request. The pilot keeps broker authority, LLM tokens, SNS accounts, final decisions, and risk responsibility under the user's control.
Safety guards come first: mock and paper verification, explicit live-action approvals, audit logs, and launch readiness checks.
Use one workspace for portfolio context, manuals, acknowledgements, agent summaries, and membership approval status.
Autofolio is a verified-membership workflow service for selected users who want structured investing operations without handing over account control.
Individual investors often spread decisions across broker apps, notes, spreadsheets, alerts, and ad hoc prompts, which makes review and handoff difficult.
Autofolio connects safety checks, portfolio visibility, agent-assisted summaries, explicit approvals, and records into a single workflow.
Building Autofolio as a verified-membership investing workflow: safety guards first, then portfolio visibility, workflow, and live-readiness. Draft preview only.
Agent outputs are workflow assistance for the user's review. Users remain responsible for final decisions and approvals.

landing_page.headline: Run an auditable investing workflow with safety gates first.
landing_page.subheadline: For selected users who want portfolio visibility, agent summaries, and explicit approvals while keeping their own account authority.

sections.title: Safety-first workflow
sections.body: Mock and paper verification, manual approval boundaries, readiness checks, and records make every step reviewable.

sections.title: Portfolio context in one place
sections.body: Bring portfolio visibility, manuals, acknowledgements, and agent summaries into a single workspace.

sections.title: Verified membership
sections.body: Start with a verified membership request. Access is approved only after review, and payment details stay outside repository artifacts.

pdf_one_pager.title: Autofolio Pilot Explainer
sections: What it is: a user-controlled investing workflow service for selected users.
Who it is for: people comfortable managing their own broker, LLM, SNS, approval, and risk boundaries.
What it emphasizes: safety guards, portfolio visibility, workflow records, agent summaries, and explicit approvals.
What it is not: an account-control service, public recommendation service, or hands-off account operator.

slides.title: Problem
slides.body: Investor context is fragmented across apps, notes, spreadsheets, alerts, and AI prompts.

slides.title: Approach
slides.body: Connect safety guards, portfolio visibility, agent summaries, explicit approvals, and records.

slides.title: Pilot Boundary
slides.body: Selected users, user-owned accounts and tokens, mock/paper-first checks, and human approval before live action.

slides.title: Review Gates
slides.body: Public claims, paid pilot terms, KIS commercial use, recommendation wording, privacy, payment, and support policies require review.

channels.text: Development note: Autofolio is being shaped as a verified-membership investing workflow with safety gates first, then portfolio visibility, workflow, and live-readiness. Public launch claims remain under review.
Draft: Autofolio focuses on safety-first investing workflows for selected users: portfolio visibility, agent summaries, explicit approvals, and auditable records.
Draft: Autofolio is moving toward a verified-membership pilot for users who want structured investing operations while keeping account authority and final decisions under their own control.
Draft: Autofolio combines portfolio context, manuals, acknowledgement flows, agent summaries, and approval checks into one reviewable workflow.

items.question: Who can use the pilot?
items.answer: Only selected users who pass verified membership review.

items.question: Does Autofolio control my brokerage account?
items.answer: No. Users keep their own account authority, settings, approvals, and risk responsibility.

items.question: How should agent summaries be described?
items.answer: They should be described as workflow assistance for user review until compliance and professional review approve stronger wording.

items.question: Can this material be posted now?
items.answer: No. It is draft source only. Public posting, customer contact, paid ads, or external account actions require Owner approval.

disclaimer.text: This draft describes a workflow product under review. It is not investment advice, a performance promise, a public offer, or confirmation of KIS commercial clearance.

required_reviews_before_use: Owner approval for any public publication, paid ad, customer contact, or external account action
Compliance Officer review for recommendation, signal, performance, tax, legal, financial-service, or KIS-related claims
Business Planner review if product form, pricing, support, or pilot boundary changes
Doc Steward or QA review before generated PDF/PPTX/SNS files are exported
